title: The Secret Life of an American Wife
actors: Walter Matthau, Anne Jackson, Patrick O'Neal
plot: A bored housewife poses as a call girl for a movie star sex-symbol, hoping she can prove to her husband, the star's agent, that she is still desirable to other men and thereby, rekindle the spark in their marriage.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
